subject: Implement Phase 5: Model 4 - Build-Operate-Transfer (BOT)
body:
Add complete BOT model with 8 variants:
- 4A: Fixed Transfer Price
- 4B: Formula-Based Transfer Price
- 4C: Fair Market Value at Transfer
- 4D: BOT with Purchase Option
- 4E: Build-Operate-Own (BOO)
- 4F: Build-Transfer-Operate (BTO)
- 4G: Build-Lease-Transfer (IFRS 16)
- 4H: Phased Transfer

Features:
- Three-perspective calculations (Developer, Buyer, Combined)
- IFRS 16 lease accounting for variant 4G
- Option probability calculations for variant 4D
- Asset timeline tracking showing ownership shifts
- Transfer pricing risk assessment
- South African tax calculations (Section 11(e), CGT)
title: Implement Phase 5: Model 4 - Build-Operate-Transfer (BOT)
